rules.name: no-hardcoded-colors-edit
rules.evidence: Tailwind only, semantic tokens (`bg-muted`, `text-foreground-light`), no hardcoded colors.

rules.name: no-hardcoded-colors-write
rules.evidence: Tailwind only, semantic tokens (`bg-muted`, `text-foreground-light`), no hardcoded colors.

rules.name: studio-shortcuts-prefer-registry-edit
rules.evidence: Prefer registered, discoverable shortcuts over one-off keyboard listeners; keep `G then ...` chords for navigation.

rules.name: studio-shortcuts-prefer-registry-write
rules.evidence: Prefer registered, discoverable shortcuts over one-off keyboard listeners; keep `G then ...` chords for navigation.

uncompilable: Language convention 'Use U.S. English everywhere' — general tone/wording guidance not tied to a detectable action pattern
UI convention 'import from `ui`, use `_Shadcn_` suffixed variants for form primitives' — no concrete anti-pattern to bind a trigger against
'Co-locate sub-components with parent' — structural preference with no reliably detectable file-path trigger
